---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Héloïse CALZAN"
date: "08/03/2022"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
setwd("E:\\github\\travail_github\\Stage_M2_Calzan")

library(readr)
tableau_donnees <- read.csv("tableau_donnees_procedure_selection_1.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ";",  na ="NA", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
tableau_sp_c <- read.csv("table_cohorte_procedure_selection_1.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ";",  na ="NA", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
```

explorations des tableaux
```{r, include=FALSE}
#tableau_donnees
summary(tableau_donnees)
sapply(tableau_donnees,FUN=function(el) sum(is.na(el)))
sapply(tableau_donnees, FUN = class)

tableau_donnees$Area <- as.factor(tableau_donnees$Area)
tableau_donnees$Species <- as.factor(tableau_donnees$Species)
tableau_donnees$Sex <- as.factor(tableau_donnees$Sex)
tableau_donnees$Maturity <- as.factor(tableau_donnees$Maturity)
tableau_donnees$AphiaID <- as.factor(tableau_donnees$AphiaID)

sapply(tableau_donnees, FUN = levels)

summary(tableau_donnees$LngtClass)
summary(tableau_donnees$Age)
#creation d'une colonne fcaohorte pour cohorte en factor ==> qui servira pour les glm
tableau_donnees$fcohorte <- as.factor(tableau_donnees$Cohorte)

#tableau_sp_c
summary(tableau_sp_c)
sapply(tableau_sp_c,FUN=function(el) sum(is.na(el)))
sapply(tableau_sp_c, FUN = class)

tableau_sp_c$Species <- as.factor(tableau_sp_c$Species)
tableau_sp_c$Cohorte_factor <- as.factor(tableau_sp_c$Cohorte_factor)

sapply(tableau_sp_c, FUN = levels)
```


Figure lm avec cohorte en variable explicative
```{r, fig.width=13,fig.height=5,fig.show='hide'}
library(ggplot2)
##Figure
ggplot(data = tableau_sp_c, aes(x = Cohorte, y = SR)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line() +
  #geom_smooth(method="lm", se=TRUE, fullrange=FALSE, level=0.95) +
  facet_wrap(~Species, scales = "free_x", ncol = 5) + 
  labs(x = "Cohorte", y = "Sexe ratio") +
  theme(strip.text.x = element_text(size=40)) +
  theme_bw()

ggsave("plot_sp.png", width = 13, height = 5)
#ggsave("plot_sp.png", width = 13, height = 6)
```


Librairies modèles
```{r library,include=FALSE}
library(lmtest)
library(lme4)
library(car)
library(nlme)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
```


**avec indice NAO**
```{r, include=FALSE}
tableau_NAO <- read.csv("Monthly mean NAO index since January 1950.csv", header = FALSE, sep = ";",  na ="NA", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
summary(tableau_NAO)
sapply(tableau_NAO,FUN=function(el) sum(is.na(el)))
sapply(tableau_NAO, FUN = class)
str(tableau_NAO)

tableau_NAO <- tableau_NAO[-73,]

names(tableau_NAO)[names(tableau_NAO) == "V1"] <- "Date"
names(tableau_NAO)[c(2: 13)] = c("Janvier","Fevrier", "Mars", "Avril", "Mai", "Juin", "Juillet", "Aout", "Septembre", "Octobre", "Novembre","Decembre")


tableau_NAO <- mutate(tableau_NAO, Moy_NAO = rowMeans(select(tableau_NAO, Janvier : Decembre), na.rm = TRUE))

Moy_NAO <- rowMeans(tableau_NAO[,2:13], na.rm = TRUE) 
tableau_NAO$Moy_NAO <- Moy_NAO

#tableau_NAO2 <- tableau_NAO %>% pivot_longer(c("Janvier","Fevrier", "Mars", "Avril", "Mai", "Juin", "Juillet", "Aout", "Septembre", "Octobre", "Novembre","Decembre")) 
#names(tableau_NAO2)[names(tableau_NAO2) == "name"] <- "Mois"
#names(tableau_NAO2)[names(tableau_NAO2) == "value"] <- "indice_NAO"

plot(tableau_NAO$Moy_NAO ~ tableau_NAO$Date)
lm(Moy_NAO ~ Date, data = tableau_NAO)
summary(lm(Moy_NAO ~ Date, data = tableau_NAO))
plot(lm(Moy_NAO ~ Date, data = tableau_NAO))

#summary(lmer(indice_NAO ~ Date + (1|Mois), data = tableau_NAO2))
```
Le tableau_NAO au dessus avec le #ont été trouvé à partir de ce site :
<https://www.cpc.ncep.noaa.gov/products/precip/CWlink/pna/nao_index.html>

```{r}
#tableau_nao_moy_JFM <- read.csv("moyennes_nao_jfm.csv", header = FALSE, sep = ";",  na ="NA", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
```
le tableau_nao_moy_JFM s'appuit sur les données de ce site :
<https://psl.noaa.gov/data/climateindices/>

<https://psl.noaa.gov/cgi-bin/data/climateindices/corr.pl?tstype1=3&custname1=&custtitle1=&tstype2=0&custname2=&custtitle2=&year1=&year2=&itypea=0&y1=&y2=&plotstyle=0&length=&lag=&iall=0&iseas=1&mon1=0&mon2=2&anom=0&climo1_yr1=&climo1_yr2=&climo2_yr1=&climo2_yr2=&Submit=Calculate+Results>

moyenne du la NAO pour Janvier Fevrier Mars

```{r}
tableau_NAO <- mutate(tableau_NAO, Moy_NAO_JFM = rowMeans(select(tableau_NAO, Janvier : Mars), na.rm = TRUE))
summary(lm(Moy_NAO_JFM ~ Date, data = tableau_NAO))

table_NAO_JFM <- tableau_NAO[,c("Date", "Moy_NAO_JFM")]
names(table_NAO_JFM)[names(table_NAO_JFM) == "Date"] <- "Cohorte"# pour que ce soit compatible avec les années cohortes des tableaux des espèces

ggplot(tableau_NAO, aes(x = Date, y = Moy_NAO_JFM)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line()+
  theme_classic()
#ggsave("moy_nao.png", width = 13, height = 6)
```



**AMO** : 
<https://psl.noaa.gov/data/timeseries/AMO/>
```{r, include=FALSE}
tableau_AMO <- read.csv("AMO unsmoothed, detrended from the Kaplan SST V2.csv", header = FALSE, sep = ";",  na ="NA", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
names(tableau_AMO)[names(tableau_AMO) == "V1"] <- "Cohorte"
names(tableau_AMO)[c(2: 13)] = c("Janvier","Fevrier", "Mars", "Avril", "Mai", "Juin", "Juillet", "Aout", "Septembre", "Octobre", "Novembre","Decembre")

summary(tableau_AMO)
sapply(tableau_AMO,FUN=function(el) sum(is.na(el)))
sapply(tableau_AMO, FUN = class)
str(tableau_AMO)

tableau_AMO <- tableau_AMO[-75,]


ggplot(tableau_AMO, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Janvier), colour = "#006666") +
  theme_classic()

ggplot(tableau_AMO, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Fevrier), colour = "#003399") +
  theme_classic()
    
ggplot(tableau_AMO, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Mars), colour = "#9933FF") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_AMO, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Avril), colour = "#FF33FF") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_AMO, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Mai), colour = "#993366") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_AMO, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Juin), colour = "#990000") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_AMO, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Juillet), colour = "#FF6600") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_AMO, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Aout), colour = "#FFCC33") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_AMO, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Septembre), colour = "#669900") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_AMO, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Octobre), colour = "#66CC66") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_AMO, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Novembre), colour = "#00CC66") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_AMO, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Decembre), colour = "#33FFFF") +
  theme_classic()



cor(tableau_AMO[,c("Janvier", "Fevrier", "Mars", "Avril", "Mai", "Juin", "Juillet", "Aout", "Septembre", "Octobre", "Novembre", "Decembre")])

tableau_AMO <- mutate(tableau_AMO, Moy_AMO = rowMeans(select(tableau_AMO, Janvier : Decembre), na.rm = TRUE))
ggplot(tableau_AMO, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Moy_AMO), colour = "#CC00CC") +
  theme_classic()


tableau_AMO_moy <- tableau_AMO[,c("Cohorte", "Moy_AMO")]
```


**GSNW**
<http://www.pml-gulfstream.org.uk/data.htm> ==> Cruises 
```{r, include=FALSE}
tableau_GSNW <- read.csv("GSNW_month.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ";",  na ="NA", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
names(tableau_GSNW)[names(tableau_GSNW) == "Year"] <- "Cohorte"
names(tableau_GSNW)[c(2: 13)] = c("Janvier","Fevrier", "Mars", "Avril", "Mai", "Juin", "Juillet", "Aout", "Septembre", "Octobre", "Novembre","Decembre")

summary(tableau_GSNW)
sapply(tableau_GSNW,FUN=function(el) sum(is.na(el)))
sapply(tableau_GSNW, FUN = class)
str(tableau_GSNW)

ggplot(tableau_GSNW, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Janvier), colour = "#006666") +
  theme_classic()

ggplot(tableau_GSNW, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Fevrier), colour = "#003399") +
  theme_classic()
    
ggplot(tableau_GSNW, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Mars), colour = "#9933FF") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_GSNW, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Avril), colour = "#FF33FF") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_GSNW, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Mai), colour = "#993366") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_GSNW, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Juin), colour = "#990000") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_GSNW, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Juillet), colour = "#FF6600") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_GSNW, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Aout), colour = "#FFCC33") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_GSNW, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Septembre), colour = "#669900") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_GSNW, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Octobre), colour = "#66CC66") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_GSNW, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Novembre), colour = "#00CC66") +
  theme_classic()
  
ggplot(tableau_GSNW, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Decembre), colour = "#33FFFF") +
  theme_classic()

cor(tableau_GSNW[,c("Janvier", "Fevrier", "Mars", "Avril", "Mai", "Juin", "Juillet", "Aout", "Septembre", "Octobre", "Novembre", "Decembre")])

ggplot(tableau_GSNW, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Annual), colour = "#CC00CC") +
  theme_classic()


tableau_GSNW_moy <- tableau_GSNW[,c("Cohorte", "Annual")]
```




```{r, fig.height=10, fig.width=20}
#ggplot(tableau_NAO2, aes(x = Mois, y = indice_NAO)) +
#  geom_point() +
#  facet_wrap(~ Date)
```




**glm**
Fonctions utiles
```{r}
#centrer réduire les variables explicatives 
fonction_scale_i <- function(tableau){
  tableau <- mutate(tableau, sc_cohorte = as.numeric(scale(Cohorte)))
  tableau <- mutate(tableau, sc_LngtClass = as.numeric(scale(LngtClass)))
  tableau <- mutate(tableau, sc_age = as.numeric(scale(Age)))
  tableau <- mutate(tableau, sc_Moy_NAO_JFM = as.numeric(scale(Moy_NAO_JFM)))
  tableau <- mutate(tableau, sc_moy_AMO = as.numeric(scale(Moy_AMO)))
  tableau <- mutate(tableau, sc_moy_GSNW = as.numeric(scale(Annual)))
}

fonction_corr <- function(tableau){
  #tableau de correlation
  corr <- cor(tableau[,c("sc_cohorte", "sc_LngtClass", "sc_age", "sc_Moy_NAO_JFM", "sc_moy_AMO", "sc_moy_GSNW")])
  return(corr)
}
```

Mettre le sexe numérique (données 0 et 1) en as.factor
```{r}
tableau_donnees$sexe_numerique <- as.factor(tableau_donnees$sexe_numerique)
```


Hareng
```{r, include=FALSE}
table_hareng_i <- filter(tableau_donnees, Species == "Clupea harengus")
table_hareng_i <- table_hareng_i[order(table_hareng_i$Cohorte),]
table_hareng_i <- merge(table_hareng_i, table_NAO_JFM, by = c("Cohorte"))
table_hareng_i <- merge(table_hareng_i, tableau_AMO_moy, by =c("Cohorte"))
table_hareng_i <- full_join(table_hareng_i, tableau_GSNW_moy, by = c("Cohorte"))


summary(table_hareng_i)

table_hareng_i <- fonction_scale_i(tableau = table_hareng_i)
sapply(table_hareng_i, FUN = class)

fonction_corr(tableau = table_hareng_i)
```
glm
```{r}
#M_i_H_c1 <- glm(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW, data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
#vif(M_i_H_c1)

#M_i_H_c3 <- glm(sexe_numerique ~   sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW, data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
#vif(M_i_H_c3)
```

J'avais fais toutes les combinaisons de modèles
```{r}
M_i_H_c <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#########################################################################################################################################
#sc_cohorte +
M_i_H_1 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

# + sc_LngtClass
M_i_H_2 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_age 
#M_i_H_3 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM 
#M_i_H_4 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_H_5 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_6 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#########################################################################################################################################

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass +
M_i_H_7 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_age
#M_i_H_8 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM
#M_i_H_9 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


#sc_cohorte + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_H_10 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +  sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_11 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


# + sc_LngtClass sc_age 
#M_i_H_12 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


# + sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + 
#M_i_H_13 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


# + sc_LngtClass  sc_moy_AMO +

# + sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_GSNW

#+ sc_age   + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM
#M_i_H_16 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


#+ sc_age + sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_H_17 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#M_i_H_18 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_20 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


#+ sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_21 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#####################################################################################################################################
#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age +
#M_i_H_22 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + 
#M_i_H_23 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass +sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_H_24 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~   sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass +sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_25 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_age sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +
#M_i_H_26 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


#sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_H_27 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_28 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM sc_moy_AMO
M_i_H_29 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM sc_moy_GSNW
M_i_H_30 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age  + sc_moy_AMO  + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
M_i_H_31 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age  + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age sc_Moy_NAO_JFM
#M_i_H_32 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_H_33 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_34 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

# sc_LngtClass sc_Moy_NAO_JFM sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_H_35 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte  + sc_age + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

# sc_LngtClass sc_Moy_NAO_JFM sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_36 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte  + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


# sc_LngtClass sc_moy_AMO sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_37<- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

# + sc_age  + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_H_38 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass  + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

# + sc_age  + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_39 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass  + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

# sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW +
M_i_H_40 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


############################################################################################################
#+ sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+
M_i_H_41 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
M_i_H_42 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte  + sc_age  + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_43 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_44 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_H_45 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW +
#M_i_H_46 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + 
#M_i_H_47 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +(1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM ++ sc_moy_GSNW 
#M_i_H_48 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_H_49 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW +
M_i_H_50 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + + sc_moy_GSNW
M_i_H_51 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +
M_i_H_52 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_53 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO  + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_H_54 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM
#M_i_H_55 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

####################################################################################################
#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_56 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_57 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_58 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_age + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_59 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_H_60 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_H_61 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte  + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

##################################################################################################

M_i_H_nul <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ 1 + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_hareng_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
```

```{r}
vif(M_i_H_c)
plot(M_i_H_c)
acf(random.effects(M_i_H_c)$fcohorte)
acf(random.effects(M_i_H_c)$Area)
pacf(random.effects(M_i_H_c)$fcohorte)
pacf(random.effects(M_i_H_c)$Area)
summary(M_i_H_c)
Anova(M_i_H_c)

vif(M_i_H_1)
summary(M_i_H_1)
Anova(M_i_H_1)

vif(M_i_H_2)
summary(M_i_H_2)
Anova(M_i_H_2)

vif(M_i_H_7)
summary(M_i_H_7)
Anova(M_i_H_7)

vif(M_i_H_29)
summary(M_i_H_29)
Anova(M_i_H_29)

vif(M_i_H_30)
summary(M_i_H_30)
Anova(M_i_H_30)

vif(M_i_H_31)
summary(M_i_H_31)
Anova(M_i_H_31)

vif(M_i_H_40)
summary(M_i_H_40)
Anova(M_i_H_40)

vif(M_i_H_50)
summary(M_i_H_50)
Anova(M_i_H_50)

vif(M_i_H_51)
summary(M_i_H_51)
Anova(M_i_H_51)

vif(M_i_H_52)
summary(M_i_H_52)
Anova(M_i_H_52)


summary(M_i_H_nul)

AIC(M_i_H_c)
AIC(M_i_H_1)
AIC(M_i_H_2)
AIC(M_i_H_7)
AIC(M_i_H_29)
AIC(M_i_H_30)
AIC(M_i_H_31)
AIC(M_i_H_40)
AIC(M_i_H_50)
AIC(M_i_H_51)
AIC(M_i_H_52)
AIC(M_i_H_nul)

summary(M_i_H_nul)
```




**figures**
```{r}
library(effects)
library(jtools)
library(sjPlot)


plot(predictorEffects(M_i_H_7, residuals = TRUE))
plot(predictorEffects( M_i_H_7))
#ggsave("effets_h.png", width = 13, height = 6)

plot_model(M_i_H_7, axis.labels = c("GSNW", "AMO", "NAO", "Age"), show.values = TRUE, show.p = TRUE, title = "effets des variables explicatives sur le sexe chez le Hareng ")
ggsave("odd_ratio_H.png", width = 13, height = 6)

plot_model(M_i_H_c2, axis.labels = c("GSNW", "AMO", "NAO", "Age", "Taille", "Cohorte"), show.values = TRUE, show.p = TRUE, title = "effets des variables explicatives sur le sexe chez le Hareng ")


#effect_plot(M_i_H_c, pred = "sc_cohorte", interval = TRUE, partial.residuals = TRUE)

```
sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  3.7051  1   0.054246 .  
sc_moy_AMO      8.3694  1   0.003816 ** 
sc_moy_GSNW     0.0806  1   0.776420 



Aiglefin
```{r, include=FALSE}
table_aiglefin_i <- filter(tableau_donnees, Species == "Melanogrammus aeglefinus")
#table_aiglefin_i <- table_aiglefin_i[-which(table_aiglefin_i$Cohorte == 2020),]
table_aiglefin_i <- table_aiglefin_i[order(table_aiglefin_i$Cohorte),]
table_aiglefin_i <- merge(table_aiglefin_i, table_NAO_JFM, by = c("Cohorte"))
table_aiglefin_i <- merge(table_aiglefin_i, tableau_AMO_moy, by =c("Cohorte"))
table_aiglefin_i <- merge(table_aiglefin_i, tableau_GSNW_moy, by = c("Cohorte"))
unique(table_aiglefin_i$fcohorte)# il y a des trous au début de la série temporelle

table_aiglefin_i <- fonction_scale_i(tableau = table_aiglefin_i)
fonction_corr(tableau = table_aiglefin_i)
sapply(table_aiglefin_i, FUN = class)

M_i_A_c1 <- glm(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW ,data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
vif(M_i_A_c1)
```

```{r}
M_i_A_c <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#########################################################################################################################################
#sc_cohorte +
M_i_A_1 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

# + sc_LngtClass
M_i_A_2 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_age 
#M_i_A_3 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM 
#M_i_A_4 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_A_5 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_A_6 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#########################################################################################################################################

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass +
M_i_A_7 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_age

#sc_cohorte + + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM

#sc_cohorte + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_A_10 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +  sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_moy_GSNW

# + sc_LngtClass sc_age

#sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_A_28 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM sc_moy_AMO
M_i_A_29 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM sc_moy_GSNW
M_i_A_30 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age  + sc_moy_AMO  + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
M_i_A_31 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age  + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age sc_Moy_NAO_JFM
#M_i_A_32 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_A_33 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_A_34 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

# sc_LngtClass sc_Moy_NAO_JFM sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_A_35 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte  + sc_age + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

# sc_LngtClass sc_Moy_NAO_JFM sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_A_36 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte  + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


# sc_LngtClass sc_moy_AMO sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_A_37<- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

# + sc_age  + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_A_38 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass  + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

# + sc_age  + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_A_39 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass  + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

# sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW +
M_i_A_40 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


############################################################################################################
#+ sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+
M_i_A_41 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
M_i_A_42 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte  + sc_age  + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_A_43 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_A_44 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_A_45 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW +
#M_i_A_46 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + 
#M_i_A_47 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +(1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM ++ sc_moy_GSNW 
#M_i_A_48 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_A_49 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW +
M_i_A_50 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + + sc_moy_GSNW
M_i_A_51 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +
M_i_A_52 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_A_53 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO  + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_A_54 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM
#M_i_A_55 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

####################################################################################################
#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_A_56 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_A_57 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_A_58 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_age + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_A_59 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_A_60 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_A_61 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte  + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

##################################################################################################

M_i_A_nul <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ 1 + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_aiglefin_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
```

```{r}
vif(M_i_A_c)
plot(M_i_A_c)
acf(random.effects(M_i_A_c)$fcohorte)
acf(random.effects(M_i_A_c)$Area)
pacf(random.effects(M_i_A_c)$fcohorte)
pacf(random.effects(M_i_A_c)$Area)
summary(M_i_A_c)
Anova(M_i_A_c)
vif(M_i_A_c)
AIC(M_i_A_c)

vif(M_i_A_1)
summary(M_i_A_1)
Anova(M_i_A_1)
AIC(M_i_A_2)

vif(M_i_A_2)
summary(M_i_A_2)
Anova(M_i_A_2)

vif(M_i_A_7)
summary(M_i_A_7)
Anova(M_i_A_7)

vif(M_i_A_29)
summary(M_i_A_29)
Anova(M_i_A_29)
AIC(M_i_A_29)

vif(M_i_A_30)
summary(M_i_A_30)
Anova(M_i_A_30)
AIC(M_i_A_30)

vif(M_i_A_31)
summary(M_i_A_31)
Anova(M_i_A_31)
AIC(M_i_A_31)

vif(M_i_A_40)
summary(M_i_A_40)
Anova(M_i_A_40)
AIC(M_i_A_40)

vif(M_i_A_50)
summary(M_i_A_50)
Anova(M_i_A_50)

vif(M_i_A_51)
summary(M_i_A_51)
Anova(M_i_A_51)

vif(M_i_A_52)
summary(M_i_A_52)
Anova(M_i_A_52)


summary(M_i_A_nul)

AIC(M_i_A_c)
AIC(M_i_A_1)
AIC(M_i_A_2)
AIC(M_i_A_7)
AIC(M_i_A_29)
AIC(M_i_A_30)
AIC(M_i_A_31)
AIC(M_i_A_40)
AIC(M_i_A_50)
AIC(M_i_A_51)
AIC(M_i_A_52)
AIC(M_i_A_nul)

summary(M_i_A_nul)




Anova(M_i_A_40)
Anova(M_i_Mo_40)
Anova(M_i_Me_40)
Anova(M_i_P_40)
Anova(M_i_L_40)
Anova(M_i_Ma_40)
Anova(M_i_S_40)
Anova(M_i_T_40)

summary(M_i_A_40)
summary(M_i_Mo_40)
summary(M_i_Me_40)
summary(M_i_P_40)
summary(M_i_L_40)
summary(M_i_Ma_40)
summary(M_i_S_40)
summary(M_i_T_40)




```
M_i_A_c2
sc_Moy_NAO_JFM    2.3479  1     0.1254    
sc_moy_AMO        0.5765  1     0.4477    
sc_moy_GSNW       0.6417  1     0.4231   

**Morue**
```{r, include=FALSE}
table_morue_i <- filter(tableau_donnees, Species == "Gadus morhua")
#outliers
#table_morue_i <- table_morue_i[-which(table_morue_i$Cohorte == 1973),]
#table_morue_i <- table_morue_i[-which(table_morue_i$Cohorte == 1975),]
#table_morue_i <- table_morue_i[-which(table_morue_i$Cohorte == 2014),]


table_morue_i <- table_morue_i[order(table_morue_i$Cohorte),]
table_morue_i <- merge(table_morue_i, table_NAO_JFM, by = c("Cohorte"))
table_morue_i <- merge(table_morue_i, tableau_AMO_moy, by =c("Cohorte"))
table_morue_i <- merge(table_morue_i, tableau_GSNW_moy, by = c("Cohorte"))
unique(table_morue_i$fcohorte)
table_morue_i <- fonction_scale_i(tableau = table_morue_i)
sapply(table_morue_i, FUN = class)

fonction_corr(tableau = table_morue_i)
M_S_Mo_c1 <- glm(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW, data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
vif(M_S_Mo_c1)
```

```{r}

M_i_Mo_c <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#########################################################################################################################################
#sc_cohorte +
M_i_Mo_1 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

# + sc_LngtClass
M_i_Mo_2 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_age 
#M_i_Mo_3 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM 
#M_i_Mo_4 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_Mo_5 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Mo_6 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#########################################################################################################################################

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass +
M_i_Mo_7 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_Mo_10 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +  sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM sc_moy_GSNW

#M_i_Mo_35 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte  + sc_age + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

# sc_LngtClass sc_Moy_NAO_JFM sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Mo_36 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte  + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


# sc_LngtClass sc_moy_AMO sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Mo_37<- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

# + sc_age  + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_Mo_38 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass  + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

# + sc_age  + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Mo_39 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass  + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

# sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW +
M_i_Mo_40 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


############################################################################################################
#+ sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+
M_i_Mo_41 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
M_i_Mo_42 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte  + sc_age  + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Mo_43 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Mo_44 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_Mo_45 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW +
#M_i_Mo_46 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + 
#M_i_Mo_47 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +(1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM ++ sc_moy_GSNW 
#M_i_Mo_48 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_Mo_49 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW +
M_i_Mo_50 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + + sc_moy_GSNW
M_i_Mo_51 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +
M_i_Mo_52 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Mo_53 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO  + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_Mo_54 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM
#M_i_Mo_55 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

####################################################################################################
#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Mo_56 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Mo_57 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Mo_58 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_age + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Mo_59 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Mo_60 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_Mo_61 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte  + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

##################################################################################################

M_i_Mo_nul <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ 1 + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_morue_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

```

```{r}
vif(M_i_Mo_c)
plot(M_i_Mo_c)
acf(random.effects(M_i_Mo_c)$fcohorte)
acf(random.effects(M_i_Mo_c)$Area)
pacf(random.effects(M_i_Mo_c)$fcohorte)
pacf(random.effects(M_i_Mo_c)$Area)
summary(M_i_Mo_c)
Anova(M_i_Mo_c)

vif(M_i_Mo_1)
summary(M_i_Mo_1)
Anova(M_i_Mo_1)

vif(M_i_Mo_2)
summary(M_i_Mo_2)
Anova(M_i_Mo_2)

vif(M_i_Mo_7)
summary(M_i_Mo_7)
Anova(M_i_Mo_7)

vif(M_i_Mo_29)
summary(M_i_Mo_29)
Anova(M_i_Mo_29)

vif(M_i_Mo_30)
summary(M_i_Mo_30)
Anova(M_i_Mo_30)

vif(M_i_Mo_31)
summary(M_i_Mo_31)
Anova(M_i_Mo_31)

vif(M_i_Mo_40)
summary(M_i_Mo_40)
Anova(M_i_Mo_40)

vif(M_i_Mo_50)
summary(M_i_Mo_50)
Anova(M_i_Mo_50)

vif(M_i_Mo_51)
summary(M_i_Mo_51)
Anova(M_i_Mo_51)

vif(M_i_Mo_52)
summary(M_i_Mo_52)
Anova(M_i_Mo_52)


summary(M_i_Mo_nul)

AIC(M_i_Mo_c)
AIC(M_i_Mo_1)
AIC(M_i_Mo_2)
AIC(M_i_Mo_7)
AIC(M_i_Mo_29)
AIC(M_i_Mo_30)
AIC(M_i_Mo_31)
AIC(M_i_Mo_40)
AIC(M_i_Mo_50)
AIC(M_i_Mo_51)
AIC(M_i_Mo_52)
AIC(M_i_Mo_nul)

summary(M_i_Mo_nul)






AIC(M_i_Mo_c)
AIC(M_i_Mo_1)
AIC(M_i_Mo_2)
AIC(M_i_Mo_7)
AIC(M_i_Mo_40)
AIC(M_i_Mo_nul)



summary(M_i_H_c)
summary(M_i_A_c)
summary(M_i_Mo_c)

```

```{r, include=FALSE}
table_merlan_i <- filter(tableau_donnees, Species == "Merlangius merlangus")
table_merlan_i <- table_merlan_i[order(table_merlan_i$Cohorte),]
#table_merlan_i <- table_merlan_i[-which(table_merlan_i$Cohorte == 1969),]


table_merlan_i <- merge(table_merlan_i, table_NAO_JFM, by = c("Cohorte"))
table_merlan_i <- merge(table_merlan_i, tableau_AMO_moy, by =c("Cohorte"))
table_merlan_i <- merge(table_merlan_i, tableau_GSNW_moy, by = c("Cohorte"))

unique(table_merlan_i$fcohorte)
table_merlan_i <- fonction_scale_i(tableau = table_merlan_i)
sapply(table_merlan_i, FUN = class)
fonction_corr(tableau = table_merlan_i)#variables age et cohorte non corrélées


M_i_Me_c1 <- glm(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW, data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
vif(M_i_Me_c1)
```

```{r}
#Modèle complet

M_i_Me_c <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#########################################################################################################################################
#sc_cohorte +
M_i_Me_1 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

# + sc_LngtClass
M_i_Me_2 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_age 
#M_i_Me_3 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM 
#M_i_Me_4 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_Me_5 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Me_6 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#########################################################################################################################################

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass +
M_i_Me_7 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_age
#M_i_Me_8 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM
#M_i_Me_9 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


#sc_cohorte + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_Me_10 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +  sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Me_11 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


# + sc_LngtClass sc_age 
#M_i_Me_12 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


# + sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + 
#M_i_Me_13 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


# + sc_LngtClass  sc_moy_AMO +

# + sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_GSNW

#+ sc_age   + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM
#M_i_Me_16 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


#+ sc_age + sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_Me_17 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Me_20 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


#+ sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Me_21 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#####################################################################################################################################
#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age +

# sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW +
M_i_Me_40 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


############################################################################################################
#+ sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+
#M_i_Me_41 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Me_42 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte  + sc_age  + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Me_43 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Me_44 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_Me_45 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW +
#M_i_Me_46 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + 
#M_i_Me_47 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +(1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM ++ sc_moy_GSNW 
#M_i_Me_48 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_Me_49 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW +
#M_i_Me_50 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Me_51 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_Me_52 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Me_53 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO  + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_Me_54 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM
#M_i_Me_55 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

####################################################################################################
#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Me_56 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Me_57 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Me_58 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_age + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Me_59 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Me_60 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_Me_61 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte  + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

##################################################################################################

M_i_Me_nul <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ 1 + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_merlan_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
```
Response: sexe_numerique
                    Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)    
sc_LngtClass   13272.0694  1  < 2.2e-16 ***
sc_age          5180.6673  1  < 2.2e-16 ***
sc_Moy_NAO_JFM     0.8430  1    0.35855    
sc_moy_AMO        30.2219  1  3.853e-08 ***
sc_moy_GSNW        4.7211  1    0.02979 *  

```{r}
vif(M_i_Me_c)
plot(M_i_Me_c)
acf(random.effects(M_i_Me_c)$fcohorte)
acf(random.effects(M_i_Me_c)$Area)
pacf(random.effects(M_i_Me_c)$fcohorte)
pacf(random.effects(M_i_Me_c)$Area)
summary(M_i_Me_c)
Anova(M_i_Me_c)

vif(M_i_Me_1)
summary(M_i_Me_1)
Anova(M_i_Me_1)

vif(M_i_Me_2)
summary(M_i_Me_2)
Anova(M_i_Me_2)

vif(M_i_Me_7)
summary(M_i_Me_7)
Anova(M_i_Me_7)

vif(M_i_Me_29)
summary(M_i_Me_29)
Anova(M_i_Me_29)

vif(M_i_Me_30)
summary(M_i_Me_30)
Anova(M_i_Me_30)

vif(M_i_Me_31)
summary(M_i_Me_31)
Anova(M_i_Me_31)

vif(M_i_Me_40)
summary(M_i_Me_40)
Anova(M_i_Me_40)

vif(M_i_Me_50)
summary(M_i_Me_50)
Anova(M_i_Me_50)

vif(M_i_Me_51)
summary(M_i_Me_51)
Anova(M_i_Me_51)

vif(M_i_Me_52)
summary(M_i_Me_52)
Anova(M_i_Me_52)


summary(M_i_Me_nul)

AIC(M_i_Me_c)
AIC(M_i_Me_1)
AIC(M_i_Me_2)
AIC(M_i_Me_7)
AIC(M_i_Me_29)
AIC(M_i_Me_30)
AIC(M_i_Me_31)
AIC(M_i_Me_40)
AIC(M_i_Me_50)
AIC(M_i_Me_51)
AIC(M_i_Me_52)
AIC(M_i_Me_nul)

summary(M_i_Me_nul)
```

```{r}
table_plie_i <- filter(tableau_donnees, Species == "Pleuronectes platessa")
#table_plie_i <- table_plie_i[-which(table_plie_i$Cohorte == 1996),]
table_plie_i <- table_plie_i[order(table_plie_i$Cohorte),]
table_plie_i <- merge(table_plie_i, table_NAO_JFM, by = c("Cohorte"))
table_plie_i <- merge(table_plie_i, tableau_AMO_moy, by =c("Cohorte"))
table_plie_i <- merge(table_plie_i, tableau_GSNW_moy, by = c("Cohorte"))

unique(table_plie_i$fcohorte)
table_plie_i <- fonction_scale_i(tableau = table_plie_i)
sapply(table_plie_i, FUN = class)

fonction_corr(tableau = table_plie_i)

M_i_P_c1 <- glm(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW, data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
vif(M_i_P_c1)
```



```{r}
#Modèle complet
M_i_P_c <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#########################################################################################################################################
#sc_cohorte +
M_i_P_1 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

# + sc_LngtClass
#M_i_P_2 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_age 
#M_i_P_3 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM 
#M_i_P_4 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_P_5 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_P_6 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#########################################################################################################################################

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass +
#M_i_P_7 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_age

#sc_cohorte + + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM

#sc_cohorte + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_P_10 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +  sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_P_11 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


# + sc_LngtClass sc_age 
#M_i_P_12 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


# + sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +

# + sc_LngtClass  sc_moy_AMO +

# + sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_GSNW

############################################################################################################

#M_i_P_46 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + 
#M_i_P_47 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +(1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM ++ sc_moy_GSNW 
#M_i_P_48 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_P_49 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW +
#M_i_P_50 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_P_51 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_P_52 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_P_53 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO  + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_P_54 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM
#M_i_P_55 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

####################################################################################################
#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_P_56 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_P_57 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_P_58 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_age + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_P_59 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_P_60 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_P_61 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte  + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

##################################################################################################

M_i_P_nul <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ 1 + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_plie_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
```
Response: sexe_numerique
                   Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)    
sc_LngtClass   3233.3023  1  < 2.2e-16 ***
sc_age          377.5388  1  < 2.2e-16 ***
sc_Moy_NAO_JFM    0.5039  1  0.4778084    
sc_moy_AMO       12.0306  1  0.0005233 ***
sc_moy_GSNW       0.1611  1  0.6881430  

```{r}
vif(M_i_P_c)
plot(M_i_P_c)
acf(random.effects(M_i_P_c)$fcohorte)
acf(random.effects(M_i_P_c)$Area)
pacf(random.effects(M_i_P_c)$fcohorte)
pacf(random.effects(M_i_P_c)$Area)
summary(M_i_P_c)
Anova(M_i_P_c)

vif(M_i_P_1)
summary(M_i_P_1)
Anova(M_i_P_1)

vif(M_i_P_2)
summary(M_i_P_2)
Anova(M_i_P_2)

vif(M_i_P_7)
summary(M_i_P_7)
Anova(M_i_P_7)

vif(M_i_P_29)
summary(M_i_P_29)
Anova(M_i_P_29)

vif(M_i_P_30)
summary(M_i_P_30)
Anova(M_i_P_30)

vif(M_i_P_31)
summary(M_i_P_31)
Anova(M_i_P_31)

vif(M_i_P_40)
summary(M_i_P_40)
Anova(M_i_P_40)

vif(M_i_P_50)
summary(M_i_P_50)
Anova(M_i_P_50)

vif(M_i_P_51)
summary(M_i_P_51)
Anova(M_i_P_51)

vif(M_i_P_52)
summary(M_i_P_52)
Anova(M_i_P_52)


summary(M_i_P_nul)

AIC(M_i_P_c)
AIC(M_i_P_1)
AIC(M_i_P_2)
AIC(M_i_P_7)
AIC(M_i_P_29)
AIC(M_i_P_30)
AIC(M_i_P_31)
AIC(M_i_P_40)
AIC(M_i_P_50)
AIC(M_i_P_51)
AIC(M_i_P_52)
AIC(M_i_P_nul)


vif(M_i_Me_c)
vif(M_i_P_c)
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
table_lieu_i <- filter(tableau_donnees, Species == "Pollachius virens")
#table_lieu_i <- table_lieu_i[-which(table_lieu_i$Cohorte == 1973),]
table_lieu_i <- table_lieu_i[order(table_lieu_i$Cohorte),]
unique(table_lieu_i$fcohorte)
table_lieu_i <- merge(table_lieu_i, table_NAO_JFM, by = c("Cohorte"))
table_lieu_i <- merge(table_lieu_i, tableau_AMO_moy, by =c("Cohorte"))
table_lieu_i <- merge(table_lieu_i, tableau_GSNW_moy, by = c("Cohorte"))

table_lieu_i <- fonction_scale_i(tableau = table_lieu_i)
sapply(table_lieu_i, FUN = class)
fonction_corr(tableau = table_lieu_i)

M_i_L_c1 <- glm(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW, data =  table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
vif(M_i_L_c1)
```

```{r}
#Modèle complet
M_i_L_c <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#########################################################################################################################################
#sc_cohorte +
M_i_L_1 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

# + sc_LngtClass
#M_i_L_2 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_age 
#M_i_L_3 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM 
#M_i_L_4 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_L_5 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_L_6 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#########################################################################################################################################

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass +
#M_i_L_7 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_age

#sc_cohorte + + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM

#sc_cohorte + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_L_10 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +  sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_L_11 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


# + sc_LngtClass sc_age 
#M_i_L_12 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


# + sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + 
#M_i_L_13 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


# + sc_LngtClass  sc_moy_AMO +

# + sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_GSNW

#+ sc_age   + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + + sc_moy_GSNW

#M_i_L_52 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_L_53 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO  + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_L_54 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM
#M_i_L_55 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

####################################################################################################
#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_L_56 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_L_57 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_L_58 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_age + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_L_59 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_L_60 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_L_61 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte  + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

##################################################################################################

M_i_L_nul <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ 1 + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_lieu_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
```

```{r}
vif(M_i_L_c)
plot(M_i_L_c)
acf(random.effects(M_i_L_c)$fcohorte)
acf(random.effects(M_i_L_c)$Area)
pacf(random.effects(M_i_L_c)$fcohorte)
pacf(random.effects(M_i_L_c)$Area)
summary(M_i_L_c)
Anova(M_i_L_c)

vif(M_i_L_1)
summary(M_i_L_1)
Anova(M_i_L_1)

vif(M_i_L_2)
summary(M_i_L_2)
Anova(M_i_L_2)

vif(M_i_L_7)
summary(M_i_L_7)
Anova(M_i_L_7)

vif(M_i_L_29)
summary(M_i_L_29)
Anova(M_i_L_29)

vif(M_i_L_30)
summary(M_i_L_30)
Anova(M_i_L_30)

vif(M_i_L_31)
summary(M_i_L_31)
Anova(M_i_L_31)

vif(M_i_L_40)
summary(M_i_L_40)
Anova(M_i_L_40)

vif(M_i_L_50)
summary(M_i_L_50)
Anova(M_i_L_50)

vif(M_i_L_51)
summary(M_i_L_51)
Anova(M_i_L_51)

vif(M_i_L_52)
summary(M_i_L_52)
Anova(M_i_L_52)


summary(M_i_L_nul)

AIC(M_i_L_c)
AIC(M_i_L_1)
AIC(M_i_L_2)
AIC(M_i_L_7)
AIC(M_i_L_29)
AIC(M_i_L_30)
AIC(M_i_L_31)
AIC(M_i_L_40)
AIC(M_i_L_50)
AIC(M_i_L_51)
AIC(M_i_L_52)
AIC(M_i_L_nul)

summary(M_i_L_nul)
```



```{r, include=FALSE}
table_maquereau_i <- filter(tableau_donnees, Species == "Scomber scombrus")
table_maquereau_i <- table_maquereau_i[order(table_maquereau_i$Cohorte),]
#table_maquereau_i <- table_maquereau_i[-which(table_maquereau_i$Cohorte == 2020),]
table_maquereau_i <- merge(table_maquereau_i, table_NAO_JFM, by = c("Cohorte"))
table_maquereau_i <- merge(table_maquereau_i, tableau_AMO_moy, by =c("Cohorte"))
table_maquereau_i <- merge(table_maquereau_i, tableau_GSNW_moy, by = c("Cohorte"))


unique(table_maquereau_i$fcohorte)
table_maquereau_i <- fonction_scale_i(tableau = table_maquereau_i)
sapply(table_maquereau_i, FUN = class)
summary(table_maquereau_i$Area)
fonction_corr(tableau = table_maquereau_i)


M_i_Ma_c1 <- glm(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +  sc_moy_GSNW, data =  table_maquereau_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
vif(M_i_Ma_c1)
```

```{r}
#Modèle complet
M_i_Ma_c <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_maquereau_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#########################################################################################################################################
#sc_cohorte +
M_i_Ma_1 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_maquereau_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

# + sc_LngtClass
#M_i_Ma_2 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_maquereau_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_age 
#M_i_Ma_3 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_maquereau_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM 
#M_i_Ma_4 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_maquereau_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_Ma_5 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_maquereau_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Ma_6 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_maquereau_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#########################################################################################################################################

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass +
#M_i_Ma_7 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_maquereau_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_age
#M_i_Ma_8 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_maquereau_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM
#M_i_Ma_9 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_maquereau_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


#sc_cohorte + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_Ma_10 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +  sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_maquereau_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Ma_11 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_maquereau_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


# + sc_LngtClass sc_age 
#M_i_Ma_12 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_maquereau_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


# + sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + 
#M_i_Ma_13 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_maquereau_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


# + sc_LngtClass  sc_moy_AMO +

# + sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_GSNW

#+ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_GSNW
```
