```{r}
####################################################################################################
#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Ma_56 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_maquereau_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Ma_57 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_maquereau_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Ma_58 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_age + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_maquereau_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Ma_59 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_maquereau_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_Ma_60 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_maquereau_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_Ma_61 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte  + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_maquereau_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

##################################################################################################

M_i_Ma_nul <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ 1 + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_maquereau_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
```

```{r}
vif(M_i_Ma_c)
plot(M_i_Ma_c)
#acf(random.effects(M_i_Ma_c)$fcohorte)
#acf(random.effects(M_i_Ma_c)$Area)
#pacf(random.effects(M_i_Ma_c)$fcohorte)
#pacf(random.effects(M_i_Ma_c)$Area)
summary(M_i_Ma_c)
Anova(M_i_Ma_c)

vif(M_i_Ma_1)
summary(M_i_Ma_1)
Anova(M_i_Ma_1)

vif(M_i_Ma_2)
summary(M_i_Ma_2)
Anova(M_i_Ma_2)

vif(M_i_Ma_7)
summary(M_i_Ma_7)
Anova(M_i_Ma_7)

vif(M_i_Ma_29)
summary(M_i_Ma_29)
Anova(M_i_Ma_29)

vif(M_i_Ma_30)
summary(M_i_Ma_30)
Anova(M_i_Ma_30)

vif(M_i_Ma_31)
summary(M_i_Ma_31)
Anova(M_i_Ma_31)

vif(M_i_Ma_40)
summary(M_i_Ma_40)
Anova(M_i_Ma_40)

vif(M_i_Ma_50)
summary(M_i_Ma_50)
Anova(M_i_Ma_50)

vif(M_i_Ma_51)
summary(M_i_Ma_51)
Anova(M_i_Ma_51)

vif(M_i_Ma_52)
summary(M_i_Ma_52)
Anova(M_i_Ma_52)


summary(M_i_Ma_nul)

AIC(M_i_Ma_c)
AIC(M_i_Ma_1)
AIC(M_i_Ma_2)
AIC(M_i_Ma_7)
AIC(M_i_Ma_29)
AIC(M_i_Ma_30)
AIC(M_i_Ma_31)
AIC(M_i_Ma_40)
AIC(M_i_Ma_50)
AIC(M_i_Ma_51)
AIC(M_i_Ma_52)
AIC(M_i_Ma_nul)

summary(M_i_Ma_nul)
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
table_sprat_i <- filter(tableau_donnees, Species == "Sprattus sprattus")
table_sprat_i <- table_sprat_i[order(table_sprat_i$Cohorte),]
#table_sprat_i <- table_sprat_i[-which(table_sprat_i$Cohorte == 1978),]
#table_sprat_i <- table_sprat_i[-which(table_sprat_i$Cohorte == 2020),]
unique(table_sprat_i$fcohorte)#trous dans la série temporelle
table_sprat_i <- merge(table_sprat_i, table_NAO_JFM, by = c("Cohorte"))
table_sprat_i <- merge(table_sprat_i, tableau_AMO_moy, by =c("Cohorte"))
table_sprat_i <- merge(table_sprat_i, tableau_GSNW_moy, by = c("Cohorte"))

table_sprat_i <- fonction_scale_i(tableau = table_sprat_i)

sapply(table_sprat_i, FUN = class)
fonction_corr(tableau = table_sprat_i)


M_i_S_c1 <- glm(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +  sc_moy_GSNW, data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

M_i_S_c1 <- glm(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO , data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
vif(M_i_S_c1) #corrélation entre AMO et Cohorte
```

```{r}
#Modèle complet
M_i_S_c <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#########################################################################################################################################
#sc_cohorte +
M_i_S_1 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

# + sc_LngtClass
#M_i_S_2 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_age 
#M_i_S_3 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM 
#M_i_S_4 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_S_5 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_S_6 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#########################################################################################################################################

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass +
#M_i_S_7 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_age
#M_i_S_8 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM
#M_i_S_9 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


#sc_cohorte + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_S_10 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +  sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_S_11 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


# + sc_LngtClass sc_age 
#M_i_S_12 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


# + sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + 
#M_i_S_13 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


# + sc_LngtClass  sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_S_14 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


# + sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_S_15 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


#+ sc_age   + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM
#M_i_S_16 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


#+ sc_age + sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_S_17 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


#+ sc_age + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_S_18 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO

#+ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_S_20 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


#+ sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_S_21 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#M_i_S_38 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass  + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

# sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW +
M_i_S_40 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age +  (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


############################################################################################################
#+ sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+
#M_i_S_41 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_S_42 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte  + sc_age  + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_S_43 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_S_44 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_S_45 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW +
#M_i_S_46 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + 
#M_i_S_47 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +(1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM ++ sc_moy_GSNW 
#M_i_S_48 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_S_49 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW +
#M_i_S_50 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_S_51 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_S_52 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_S_53 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO  + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_S_54 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM
#M_i_S_55 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

####################################################################################################
#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_S_56 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_S_57 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_S_58 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_age + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_S_59 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_S_60 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_S_61 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte  + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

##################################################################################################

M_i_S_nul <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ 1 + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_sprat_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
```

```{r}
vif(M_i_S_c)
plot(M_i_S_c)
acf(random.effects(M_i_S_c)$fcohorte)
acf(random.effects(M_i_S_c)$Area)
pacf(random.effects(M_i_S_c)$fcohorte)
pacf(random.effects(M_i_S_c)$Area)
summary(M_i_S_c)
Anova(M_i_S_c)

vif(M_i_S_1)
summary(M_i_S_1)
Anova(M_i_S_1)

vif(M_i_S_2)
summary(M_i_S_2)
Anova(M_i_S_2)

vif(M_i_S_7)
summary(M_i_S_7)
Anova(M_i_S_7)

vif(M_i_S_29)
summary(M_i_S_29)
Anova(M_i_S_29)

vif(M_i_S_30)
summary(M_i_S_30)
Anova(M_i_S_30)

vif(M_i_S_31)
summary(M_i_S_31)
Anova(M_i_S_31)

vif(M_i_S_40)
summary(M_i_S_40)
Anova(M_i_S_40)

vif(M_i_S_50)
summary(M_i_S_50)
Anova(M_i_S_50)

vif(M_i_S_51)
summary(M_i_S_51)
Anova(M_i_S_51)

vif(M_i_S_52)
summary(M_i_S_52)
Anova(M_i_S_52)


summary(M_i_S_nul)

AIC(M_i_S_c)
AIC(M_i_S_1)
AIC(M_i_S_2)
AIC(M_i_S_7)
AIC(M_i_S_29)
AIC(M_i_S_30)
AIC(M_i_S_31)
AIC(M_i_S_40)
AIC(M_i_S_50)
AIC(M_i_S_51)
AIC(M_i_S_52)
AIC(M_i_S_nul)

summary(M_i_S_nul)
```
```{r}

#plot(predictorEffects(M_i_S_7, residuals = TRUE))
#ggsave("effet_S.png",plot = plot(predictorEffects(M_i_S_7, residuals = TRUE)), width = 13, height = 6)
.#plot(predictorEffects( M_i_H_40))
#ggsave("effets_h.png", width = 13, height = 6)

#plot_model(M_i_S_7, axis.labels = c("GSNW", "AMO", "NAO", "Age"),  show.values = TRUE, show.p = TRUE, title = "effets des variables explicatives sur le sexe chez le Sprat ")

#ggsave("odd_ratio_S.png", width = 13, height = 6)
```



```{r, include=FALSE}
table_tacaud_i <- filter(tableau_donnees, Species == "Trisopterus esmarkii")
#table_tacaud_i <- table_tacaud_i[-which(table_tacaud_i$Cohorte == 1970),]
table_tacaud_i <- table_tacaud_i[order(table_tacaud_i$Cohorte),]
table_tacaud_i <- merge(table_tacaud_i, table_NAO_JFM, by = c("Cohorte"))
table_tacaud_i <- merge(table_tacaud_i, tableau_AMO_moy, by =c("Cohorte"))
table_tacaud_i <- merge(table_tacaud_i, tableau_GSNW_moy, by = c("Cohorte"))


unique(table_tacaud_i$fcohorte)
table_tacaud_i <- fonction_scale_i(tableau = table_tacaud_i)
sapply(table_tacaud_i, FUN = class)
fonction_corr(tableau = table_tacaud_i)

M_i_T_c1 <- glm(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age+ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW, data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
vif(M_i_T_c1)
```


```{r}
#Modèle complet
M_i_T_c <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#########################################################################################################################################
#sc_cohorte +
M_i_T_1 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

# + sc_LngtClass
#M_i_T_2 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_age 
#M_i_T_3 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM 
#M_i_T_4 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_moy_AMO
#M_i_T_5 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM  + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_T_6 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#########################################################################################################################################

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass +
#M_i_T_7 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_age
#M_i_T_8 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM
#M_i_T_9 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


#sc_cohorte + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_T_10 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM +  sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_T_11 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


# + sc_LngtClass sc_age 
#M_i_T_12 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


# + sc_LngtClass + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + 
#M_i_T_13 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


# + sc_LngtClass  sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_T_14 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))


# + sc_LngtClass + sc_moy_GSNW

#+ sc_age   + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM

#+ sc_age + sc_moy_AMO

#sc_cohorte sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_T_53 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO  + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#M_i_T_55 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

####################################################################################################
#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_T_56 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_T_57 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_LngtClass + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_T_58 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_age + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + + sc_moy_AMO + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_T_59 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#sc_cohorte + sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_GSNW
#M_i_T_60 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~  sc_moy_AMO + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

#+ sc_LngtClass + sc_age + sc_Moy_NAO_JFM + sc_moy_AMO +
#M_i_T_61 <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ sc_cohorte  + sc_moy_GSNW+ (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))

##################################################################################################

M_i_T_nul <- glmer(sexe_numerique ~ 1 + (1| Area) + (1| fcohorte), data =  table_tacaud_i, family = binomial(link=logit))
```

```{r}
vif(M_i_T_c)
plot(M_i_T_c)
acf(random.effects(M_i_T_c)$fcohorte)
acf(random.effects(M_i_T_c)$Area)
pacf(random.effects(M_i_T_c)$fcohorte)
pacf(random.effects(M_i_T_c)$Area)
summary(M_i_T_c)
Anova(M_i_T_c)

vif(M_i_T_1)
summary(M_i_T_1)
Anova(M_i_T_1)

vif(M_i_T_2)
summary(M_i_T_2)
Anova(M_i_T_2)

vif(M_i_T_7)
summary(M_i_T_7)
Anova(M_i_T_7)

vif(M_i_T_29)
summary(M_i_T_29)
Anova(M_i_T_29)

vif(M_i_T_30)
summary(M_i_T_30)
Anova(M_i_T_30)

vif(M_i_T_31)
summary(M_i_T_31)
Anova(M_i_T_31)

vif(M_i_T_40)
summary(M_i_T_40)
Anova(M_i_T_40)

vif(M_i_T_50)
summary(M_i_T_50)
Anova(M_i_T_50)

vif(M_i_T_51)
summary(M_i_T_51)
Anova(M_i_T_51)

vif(M_i_T_52)
summary(M_i_T_52)
Anova(M_i_T_52)


summary(M_i_T_nul)

AIC(M_i_T_c)
AIC(M_i_T_1)
AIC(M_i_T_2)
AIC(M_i_T_7)
AIC(M_i_T_29)
AIC(M_i_T_30)
AIC(M_i_T_31)
AIC(M_i_T_40)
AIC(M_i_T_50)
AIC(M_i_T_51)
AIC(M_i_T_52)
AIC(M_i_T_nul)

summary(M_i_T_nul)



AIC(M_i_H_c)
AIC(M_i_A_c)
AIC(M_i_Mo_c)
AIC(M_i_Me_c)
AIC(M_i_P_c)
AIC(M_i_L_c)
AIC(M_i_Ma_c)
AIC(M_i_S_c)
AIC(M_i_T_c)

summary(M_i_H_nul)
summary(M_i_A_nul)
summary(M_i_Mo_nul)
summary(M_i_Me_nul)
summary(M_i_P_nul)
summary(M_i_L_nul)
summary(M_i_Ma_nul)
summary(M_i_S_nul)
summary(M_i_T_nul)


```

**résidus vs predictions**
```{r, fig.height=5}
plot(M_i_H_c,  type=c("p","smooth"), col.line=1, main = "Residus VS prediction, Hareng, modèle complet", col = 3)


plot(M_i_A_c,  type=c("p","smooth"), col.line=1, main = "Residus VS prediction, Aiglefin, modèle complet", col = 3)


plot(M_i_Mo_c,  type=c("p","smooth"), col.line=1, main = "Residus VS prediction, Morue, modèle complet", col = 3)

plot(M_i_Me_c,  type=c("p","smooth"), col.line=1, main = "Residus VS prediction, Merlan, modèle complet", col = 3)

plot(M_i_P_c,  type=c("p","smooth"), col.line=1, main = "Residus VS prediction, Plie, modèle complet", col = 3)

plot(M_i_L_c,  type=c("p","smooth"), col.line=1, main = "Residus VS prediction, Lieu, modèle complet", col = 3)

plot(M_i_Ma_c,  type=c("p","smooth"), col.line=1, main = "Residus VS prediction, Maquereau, modèle complet", col = 3)

plot(M_i_S_c,  type=c("p","smooth"), col.line=1, main = "Residus VS prediction, Sprat, modèle complet", col = 3)

plot(M_i_T_c,  type=c("p","smooth"), col.line=1, main = "Residus VS prediction, Tacaud, modèle complet", col = 3)



```


```{r, fig.height=15, fig.width=8}
library(ggResidpanel)
H_plot <-resid_compare(list(M_i_H_c), plots = c("resid", "index", "yvp", "boxplot"), type = "deviance", smoother = TRUE)

#A_plot <- resid_compare(list(M_i_A_c), plots = c("resid", "index", "yvp", "boxplot"), type = "deviance", smoother = TRUE)

Mo_plot <- resid_compare(list( M_i_Mo_c), plots = c("resid", "index", "yvp", "boxplot"), type = "deviance", smoother = TRUE)

#Me_plot <- resid_compare(list(M_i_Me_c), plots = c("resid", "index", "yvp", "boxplot"), type = "deviance", smoother = TRUE)

P_plot <- resid_compare(list(M_i_P_c), plots = c("resid", "index", "yvp", "boxplot"), type = "deviance", smoother = TRUE)

#L_plot <- resid_compare(list(M_i_L_c), plots = c("resid", "index", "yvp", "boxplot"), type = "deviance", smoother = TRUE)

Ma_plot <- resid_compare(list(M_i_Ma_c), plots = c("resid", "index", "yvp", "boxplot"), type = "deviance", smoother = TRUE)

S_plot <- resid_compare(list(M_i_S_c), plots = c("resid", "index", "yvp", "boxplot"), type = "deviance", smoother = TRUE)

#T_plot <- resid_compare(list(M_i_T_c), plots = c("resid", "index", "yvp", "boxplot"), type = "deviance", smoother = TRUE)

LS_plot <- resid_compare(list(M_i_LS_c), plots = c("resid", "index", "yvp", "boxplot"), type = "deviance", smoother = TRUE)


#resid_compare(list(M_i_A_c, M_i_A_1, M_i_A_40), plots = c("resid"), type = "pearson", smoother = TRUE)
```

#scale-location plot
```{r}

plot(M_i_H_c, sqrt(abs(resid(., type = "deviance")))~fitted(.), type=c("p","smooth"), col.line=1, col = 7, main = "scale - location plot Hareng, modèle complet") #racine carré de la valeur aboslue des résidus

plot(M_i_H_c, sqrt(abs(resid(., type = "response")))~fitted(.), type=c("p","smooth"), col.line=1, col = 7, main = "scale - location plot Hareng, modèle complet") #racine carré de la valeur aboslue des résidus


plot(M_i_H_c, sqrt(abs(resid(., type = "pearson")))~fitted(.), type=c("p","smooth"), col.line=1, col = 7, main = "scale - location plot Hareng, modèle complet") #racine carré de la valeur aboslue des résidus


## standardized residuals versus fitted values by gender
#plot(M_i_H_c, resid(., scaled=TRUE) ~ fitted(.), abline = 0)

plot(M_i_H_c, sqrt(abs(resid(.)))~fitted(.), type=c("p","smooth"), col.line=1, col = 3, main = "scale - location plot Hareng, modèle complet")



######################
plot(M_i_A_c, sqrt(abs(resid(.)))~fitted(.), type=c("p","smooth"), col.line=1, col = 3, main = "scale - location plot Aiglefin, modèle complet")


######################
plot(M_i_Me_c, sqrt(abs(resid(.)))~fitted(.), type=c("p","smooth"), col.line=1, col = 3, main = "scale - location plot Merlan, modèle complet")



######################
plot(M_i_Mo_c, sqrt(abs(resid(.)))~fitted(.), type=c("p","smooth"), col.line=1, col = 3, main = "scale - location plot Morue, modèle complet")


######################
plot(M_i_P_c, sqrt(abs(resid(.)))~fitted(.), type=c("p","smooth"), col.line=1, col = 3, main = "scale - location plot Plie, modèle complet")


######################
plot(M_i_L_c, sqrt(abs(resid(.)))~fitted(.),  type=c("p","smooth"), col.line=1, col = 3, main = "scale - location plot Lieu, modèle complet")

######################
plot(M_i_Ma_c, sqrt(abs(resid(.)))~fitted(.), type=c("p","smooth"), col.line=1, col = 3, main = "scale - location plot Maquereau, modèle complet")


######################
plot(M_i_S_c, sqrt(abs(resid(.)))~fitted(.), type=c("p","smooth"), col.line=1, col = 3, main = "scale - location plot Sprat, modèle complet")

######################
plot(M_i_T_c, sqrt(abs(resid(.)))~fitted(.),  type=c("p","smooth"), col.line=1, col = 3, main = "scale - location plot Tacaud, modèle complet")


```

Observation contre predicion 1
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(table_hareng_i[-which(table_hareng_i$Cohorte < 1966 | table_hareng_i$Cohorte == 2021),], aes(x = fitted(M_i_H_c) ,y = sexe_numerique)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1, position = "jitter") +
  ggtitle("Observations vs predictions Hareng modèle complet", subtitle = "avec selection a priori") +
  theme_classic()


ggplot(table_aiglefin_i, aes(x = fitted(M_i_A_c) ,y = sexe_numerique)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1, position = "jitter") +
  ggtitle("Observations vs predictions Aiglefin modèle complet", subtitle = "avec selection a priori")+
  theme_classic()


ggplot(table_morue_i, aes(x = fitted(M_i_Mo_c), y = sexe_numerique)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1, position = "jitter") +
  ggtitle("Observations vs predictions Morue modèle complet", subtitle = "avec selection a priori") +
  theme_classic()


ggplot(table_merlan_i, aes(x = fitted(M_i_Me_c), y = sexe_numerique)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1, position = "jitter") +
  ggtitle("Observations vs predictions Merlan modèle complet", subtitle = "avec selection a priori") +
  theme_classic()



ggplot(table_plie_i, aes(x = fitted(M_i_P_c), y = sexe_numerique)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1, position = "jitter") +
  ggtitle("Observations vs predictions Plie modèle complet", subtitle = "avec selection a priori") +
  theme_classic()


ggplot(table_lieu_i, aes(x = fitted(M_i_L_c), y = sexe_numerique)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1, position = "jitter") +
  ggtitle("Observations vs predictions Lieu modèle complet", subtitle = "avec selection a priori") +
  theme_classic()



ggplot(table_maquereau_i, aes(x = fitted(M_i_Ma_c), y = sexe_numerique)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1, position = "jitter") +
  ggtitle("Observations vs predictions Maquereau modèle complet", subtitle = "avec selection a priori") +
  theme_classic()



ggplot(table_sprat_i, aes(x = fitted(M_i_S_c), y = sexe_numerique)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1, position = "jitter") +
  ggtitle("Observations vs predictions Sprat modèle complet", subtitle = "avec selection a priori") +
  theme_classic()


ggplot(table_tacaud_i, aes(x = fitted(M_i_T_c), y = sexe_numerique)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1, position = "jitter") +
  ggtitle("Observations vs predictions Tacaud modèle complet", subtitle = "avec selection a priori") +
  theme_classic()

```

```{R}
ggplot(table_hareng_i[-which(table_hareng_i$Cohorte < 1966 | table_hareng_i$Cohorte == 2021),], aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_point(aes(y = sexe_numerique), color = "#00AFBB", size = 2, shape = 5) +
  geom_point(aes(y = fitted(M_i_H_c), colour = "blue", alpha = 0.1))


ggplot(table_hareng_i[-which(table_hareng_i$Cohorte < 1966 | table_hareng_i$Cohorte == 2021),], aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_point(aes( y = fitted(M_i_H_c), colour = "red", alpha = 0.1)) +
  geom_point(data = table_hareng_i, aes(y = as.integer(sexe_numerique)))
 # geom_point(data = table_hareng_i[-which(table_hareng_i$Cohorte < 1966 | table_hareng_i$Cohorte == 2021),], aes(y = sexe_numerique, colour = "blue"))
class(table_hareng_i$sexe_numerique)

ggplot(table_hareng_i[-which(table_hareng_i$Cohorte < 1966 | table_hareng_i$Cohorte == 2021),], aes(x = Cohorte)) +
  geom_point(aes( y = as.character.numeric_version(sexe_numerique), colour = "red", alpha = 0.01), position = "jitter") +
  geom_point(aes( y = fitted(M_i_H_c), colour = "green", alpha = 0.1)) 
  
summary(as.integer(table_hareng_i$sexe_numerique))
summary(table_hareng_i$sexe_numerique)


ggplot(table_hareng_i[-which(table_hareng_i$Cohorte < 1966 | table_hareng_i$Cohorte == 2021),], aes(x = Cohorte)) +
 # geom_point(aes( y = as.character.numeric_version(sexe_numerique), colour = "red", alpha = 0.01), position = "jitter") +
  geom_point(aes( y = fitted(M_i_H_c)), colour = "#339966", alpha = 0.1, shape = 5) +
  theme_classic()

ggplot(table_hareng_i[-which(table_hareng_i$Cohorte < 1966 | table_hareng_i$Cohorte == 2021),], aes(x = Cohorte, color = sexe_numerique)) +
  geom_point(aes( y = (sexe_numerique), colour = sexe_numerique),  alpha = 0.01, position = "jitter") +
  #geom_point(aes( y = fitted(M_i_H_c)), colour = "#339966", alpha = 0.1, shape = 5) +
  theme_classic()
  
##############  
  
ggplot(table_aiglefin_i, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
 # geom_point(aes( y = as.character.numeric_version(sexe_numerique), colour = "red", alpha = 0.01), position = "jitter") +
  geom_point(aes( y = fitted(M_i_A_c)), colour = "#339966", alpha = 0.1, shape = 5) +
  theme_classic()

ggplot(table_aiglefin_i, aes(x = Cohorte, color = sexe_numerique)) +
  geom_point(aes( y = (sexe_numerique), colour = sexe_numerique),  alpha = 0.01, position = "jitter") +
  #geom_point(aes( y = fitted(M_i_H_c)), colour = "#339966", alpha = 0.1, shape = 5) +
  theme_classic()

#################
ggplot(table_morue_i, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
 # geom_point(aes( y = as.character.numeric_version(sexe_numerique), colour = "red", alpha = 0.01), position = "jitter") +
  geom_point(aes( y = fitted(M_i_Mo_c)), colour = "#339966", alpha = 0.1, shape = 5) +
  theme_classic()

ggplot(table_morue_i, aes(x = Cohorte, color = sexe_numerique)) +
  geom_point(aes( y = (sexe_numerique), colour = sexe_numerique),  alpha = 0.05, position = "jitter") +
  #geom_point(aes( y = fitted(M_i_H_c)), colour = "#339966", alpha = 0.1, shape = 5) +
  theme_classic()

#################
ggplot(table_merlan_i, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
 # geom_point(aes( y = as.character.numeric_version(sexe_numerique), colour = "red", alpha = 0.01), position = "jitter") +
  geom_point(aes( y = fitted(M_i_Me_c)), colour = "#339966", alpha = 0.1, shape = 5) +
  theme_classic()

ggplot(table_merlan_i, aes(x = Cohorte, color = sexe_numerique)) +
  geom_point(aes( y = (sexe_numerique), colour = sexe_numerique),  alpha = 0.05, position = "jitter") +
  #geom_point(aes( y = fitted(M_i_H_c)), colour = "#339966", alpha = 0.1, shape = 5) +
  theme_classic()

###########
ggplot(table_plie_i, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
 # geom_point(aes( y = as.character.numeric_version(sexe_numerique), colour = "red", alpha = 0.01), position = "jitter") +
  geom_point(aes( y = fitted(M_i_P_c)), colour = "#339966", alpha = 0.3, shape = 5) +
  theme_classic()

ggplot(table_plie_i, aes(x = Cohorte, color = sexe_numerique)) +
  geom_point(aes( y = (sexe_numerique), colour = sexe_numerique),  alpha = 0.05, position = "jitter") +
  #geom_point(aes( y = fitted(M_i_H_c)), colour = "#339966", alpha = 0.1, shape = 5) +
  theme_classic()



###########
ggplot(table_lieu_i, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
 # geom_point(aes( y = as.character.numeric_version(sexe_numerique), colour = "red", alpha = 0.01), position = "jitter") +
  geom_point(aes( y = fitted(M_i_L_c)), colour = "#339966", alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) +
  theme_classic()

ggplot(table_lieu_i, aes(x = Cohorte, color = sexe_numerique)) +
  geom_point(aes( y = (sexe_numerique), colour = sexe_numerique),  alpha = 0.05, position = "jitter") +
  #geom_point(aes( y = fitted(M_i_H_c)), colour = "#339966", alpha = 0.1, shape = 5) +
  theme_classic()

###########
ggplot(table_maquereau_i, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
 # geom_point(aes( y = as.character.numeric_version(sexe_numerique), colour = "red", alpha = 0.01), position = "jitter") +
  geom_point(aes( y = fitted(M_i_Ma_c)), colour = "#339966", alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) +
  theme_classic()

ggplot(table_maquereau_i, aes(x = Cohorte, color = sexe_numerique)) +
  geom_point(aes( y = (sexe_numerique), colour = sexe_numerique),  alpha = 0.05, position = "jitter") +
  #geom_point(aes( y = fitted(M_i_H_c)), colour = "#339966", alpha = 0.1, shape = 5) +
  theme_classic()

###########
ggplot(table_sprat_i, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
 # geom_point(aes( y = as.character.numeric_version(sexe_numerique), colour = "red", alpha = 0.01), position = "jitter") +
  geom_point(aes( y = fitted(M_i_S_c)), colour = "#339966", alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) +
  theme_classic()

ggplot(table_sprat_i, aes(x = Cohorte, color = sexe_numerique)) +
  geom_point(aes( y = (sexe_numerique), colour = sexe_numerique),  alpha = 0.05, position = "jitter") +
  #geom_point(aes( y = fitted(M_i_H_c)), colour = "#339966", alpha = 0.1, shape = 5) +
  theme_classic()

###########
ggplot(table_tacaud_i, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
 # geom_point(aes( y = as.character.numeric_version(sexe_numerique), colour = "red", alpha = 0.01), position = "jitter") +
  geom_point(aes( y = fitted(M_i_T_c)), colour = "#339966", alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) +
  theme_classic()

ggplot(table_tacaud_i, aes(x = Cohorte, color = sexe_numerique)) +
  geom_point(aes( y = (sexe_numerique), colour = sexe_numerique),  alpha = 0.05, position = "jitter") +
  #geom_point(aes( y = fitted(M_i_H_c)), colour = "#339966", alpha = 0.1, shape = 5) +
  theme_classic()

###########
ggplot(table_LS_i, aes(x = Cohorte)) +
 # geom_point(aes( y = as.character.numeric_version(sexe_numerique), colour = "red", alpha = 0.01), position = "jitter") +
  geom_point(aes( y = fitted(M_i_LS_c)), colour = "#339966", alpha = 0.5, shape = 5) +
  theme_classic()

ggplot(table_LS_i, aes(x = Cohorte, color = sexe_numerique)) +
  geom_point(aes( y = (sexe_numerique), colour = sexe_numerique),  alpha = 0.1, position = "jitter") +
  #geom_point(aes( y = fitted(M_i_H_c)), colour = "#339966", alpha = 0.1, shape = 5) +
  theme_classic()
```
